description: A telematics system on a combine harvester reports that it is due for its 200-hour service.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the maintenance alert and verify the machine's current operating hours.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the machine has exceeded 200 hours since its last service.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the standard maintenance checklist for the 200-hour service for that specific combine model.

expected_outcome.value: Agent retrieves the correct maintenance checklist.

nodes.task_description: Create a work order in the maintenance system and assign it to the lead mechanic.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates and assigns the work order.
